title: Einkaufs-Experte mit Schwerpunkt Methoden & Prozesse / Projektmanagement (m/w/d)
required_skills: Affinity to modern technology & digitalization in procurement
Degree in Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen / Betriebswirtschaft or equivalent
matched_skills: Project management (PMO at HSBC, coordination at Hapag-Lloyd)
Analytical & structured working style (KPI frameworks, reporting)
Affinity to modern technology & AI tools (Power BI, ChatGPT, Claude)
missing_skills: Source-to-Pay process knowledge — no procurement background at all
Procurement / Einkauf domain experience — candidate has no purchasing role
Business-fluent German (verhandlungssicher) — candidate is B1 only
ERP / SAP procurement modules (SAP MM, Ariba or equivalent)
Workshop design & moderation in procurement context
core_responsibilities: Further develop procurement processes and methods across the full Source-to-Pay lifecycle, with emphasis on AI technologies
Plan, moderate, and steer workshops in international and interdisciplinary teams
Initiate and manage projects to harmonise and optimise procurement methods and processes
Advise and support the purchasing function and adjacent departments
Coordinate and communicate with internal interfaces and global teams
recommended_emphasis: Highlight PMO governance experience at HSBC (USD 8M programme, 6 workstreams) as the closest analogue to procurement project management
Emphasise cross-functional coordination and process optimisation work at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC
Showcase AI tool fluency (ChatGPT, Claude, Power BI) as signal of technology affinity
Stress structured, analytical working style through KPI framework design and executive reporting examples
If applying, obtain at minimum B2/C1 German before submitting — B1 is a hard dealbreaker for 'verhandlungssicher' requirement

company_info.size_raw: Liebherr Group — global industrial conglomerate, inferred 10,001+ from 'konzernweit' / global network context in JD; Liebherr publicly known to have >50,000 employees
